title: How change value of board-relation type column
excerpt:
Hi community, 
How i can change the value of a board-relation type column? Is there any way? 
Thanks in advance.

posts.author: jsanchezcs (José Sánchez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community,

How i can change the value of a board-relation type column? Is there any way?

Thanks in advance.

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jsanchezcs, welcome to the community!

Great question-- it sounds to me like you’re hoping to change the item that’s linked in a Connect boards column, is that right?

If so, check out this section of our API documentation: https://monday.com/developers/v2#column-values-section-itemlink.

I believe you would just need to use the change_column_value mutation, and you should be good to go.

-Helen

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
